title: Half Health
description: Players now spawn with 5 hearts instead of 10
body:
# Half Health Datapack Overview
## Description

Half Health is a Minecraft datapack designed to increase the challenge of your gameplay by reducing the maximum health of all players. Upon spawning or respawning, players will start with a fixed health amount. This change forces players to be more cautious in their adventures, as every encounter becomes more perilous with only half the usual health pool.

## Features

Reduced Max Health: Players begin with a fixed health amount. You can set this (Default 10) by doing `/scoreboard players set #var fixed_health <Amount in Half Hearts>`
Increased Difficulty: With less health, surviving in the Minecraft world becomes a more challenging experience, adding a new layer of difficulty to the game.
Balanced Gameplay: Suitable for survival servers or players looking for a hardcore experience without the permanence of Hardcore mode.
## Compatibility

This datapack is compatible with the latest version of Minecraft and can be easily added to any new or existing world. It does not require any mods, making it a lightweight addition to your game.

## How to Install

Download the Half Health datapack.
Place the downloaded file into the datapacks folder of your world.
Reload or restart the world to activate the datapack.
